mapper.select: select id, order_id, flow_config_id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, current_stage_no, status, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_instance where order_id = #{orderId} order by id desc limit 1

select id, order_id, flow_config_id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, current_stage_no, status, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_instance where id = #{id}

select id, instance_id, order_id, stage_no, stage_name, task_type, undertake_dept_id, undertake_dept_name, approve_dept_id, approve_dept_name, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, opinion, status, action_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_task where instance_id = #{instanceId} order by stage_no asc, id asc

select t.id, t.instance_id, t.order_id, t.stage_no, t.stage_name, t.task_type, t.undertake_dept_id, t.undertake_dept_name, t.approve_dept_id, t.approve_dept_name, t.reviewer_id, t.reviewer_name, t.opinion, t.status, t.action_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, w.title as order_title, w.xf_demand, w.xf_case_no from xf_approve_task t left join xf_work_order w on w.id = t.order_id inner join xf_assign_record ar on ar.order_id = t.order_id and ar.assign_dept_id = t.undertake_dept_id and ar.status = '2' and ar.report_time is not null and ar.report_content is not null and ar.report_content != '' where t.approve_dept_id = #{deptId} and t.status = '0' order by t.create_time desc, t.id desc

select t.id, t.instance_id, t.order_id, t.stage_no, t.stage_name, t.task_type, t.undertake_dept_id, t.undertake_dept_name, t.approve_dept_id, t.approve_dept_name, t.reviewer_id, t.reviewer_name, t.opinion, t.status, t.action_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, w.title as order_title, w.xf_demand, w.xf_case_no from xf_approve_task t left join xf_work_order w on w.id = t.order_id where t.approve_dept_id = #{deptId} and t.status in ('1', '2') order by t.action_time desc, t.id desc

select id, instance_id, order_id, stage_no, stage_name, task_type, undertake_dept_id, undertake_dept_name, approve_dept_id, approve_dept_name, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, opinion, status, action_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from xf_approve_task where id = #{id}

select t.id, t.instance_id, t.order_id, t.stage_no, t.stage_name, t.task_type, t.undertake_dept_id, t.undertake_dept_name, t.approve_dept_id, t.approve_dept_name, t.reviewer_id, t.reviewer_name, t.opinion, t.status, t.action_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time from xf_approve_task t inner join xf_assign_record ar on ar.order_id = t.order_id and ar.assign_dept_id = t.undertake_dept_id and ar.status = '2' and ar.report_time is not null and ar.report_content is not null and ar.report_content != '' where t.instance_id = #{instanceId} and t.approve_dept_id = #{approveDeptId} and t.status = '0' order by t.undertake_dept_id asc, t.stage_no asc, t.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into xf_approve_instance( order_id, flow_config_id, flow_name, apply_dept_id, apply_dept_name, current_stage_no, status, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{orderId}, #{flowConfigId}, #{flowName}, #{applyDeptId}, #{applyDeptName}, #{currentStageNo}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )

insert into xf_approve_task( instance_id, order_id, stage_no, stage_name, task_type, undertake_dept_id, undertake_dept_name, approve_dept_id, approve_dept_name, reviewer_id, reviewer_name, opinion, status, action_time, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{item.instanceId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.stageNo}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.undertakeDeptId}, #{item.undertakeDeptName}, #{item.approveDeptId}, #{item.approveDeptName}, #{item.reviewerId}, #{item.reviewerName}, #{item.opinion}, #{item.status}, #{item.actionTime}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(distinct undertake_dept_id) from xf_approve_task where instance_id = #{instanceId} and undertake_dept_id is not null

select count(distinct t.undertake_dept_id) from xf_approve_task t inner join xf_assign_record ar on ar.order_id = t.order_id and ar.assign_dept_id = t.undertake_dept_id and ar.status = '2' and ar.report_time is not null and ar.report_content is not null and ar.report_content != '' where t.instance_id = #{instanceId} and t.approve_dept_id = #{approveDeptId} and t.status = '0' and t.undertake_dept_id is not null
